title: Health and Digital Gaming: Expert Interviews 2021
description: The dataset consists of interview transcripts with health care professionals who have experience of working with people who sought help for compulsive gaming. First, the interviewees were asked about their careers and treatment experience related to compulsive gaming. They were then asked to reflect on whether there were any commonalities between the cases they had observed in treatment.
